jei.info.advanced_table: This table can only be crafted after completing the 'Advanced Gold Engineering' research in your colony's University.
jei.info.elite_table: This table can only be crafted after completing the 'Advanced Diamond Engineering' research in your colony's University.
jei.info.ultimate_table: This table can only be crafted after completing the 'Advanced Emerald Engineering' research in your colony's University.
group.quests.title: Quests
group.final.title: Endgame
chapter.foundation.title: The Foundation
quest.foundation.university.title: The Seat of Knowledge
quest.foundation.university.desc: Every great civilization begins with research. &a&lEstablish your colony&r&r and build the &a&lUniversity&r&r. It will be the heart of your technological advancement.
quest.foundation.infra.title: Basic Infrastructure
quest.foundation.infra.desc: To process advanced technologies, you need brute force. \n\n&c&lAttention:&r&r Advanced Table research requires your &lBlacksmith&r to be at &l&aLevel 2&r&r, in addition to consuming these 32 Gold Frames.
quest.foundation.gold_eng.title: Gold Engineering
quest.foundation.gold_eng.desc: University research was a success. With the support of your Blacksmith (Level 2) and the 32 Gold Frames, you can now assemble your first &6&lExtended Crafting Table&r&r. The beginning of true technology.
quest.foundation.precision.title: Precision Engineering
quest.foundation.precision.desc: Heavy machinery enters the scene. To unlock the Elite Table, evolve your &lMechanic&r to &a&lLevel 4&r&r and deliver the 16 Diamond Frames to the University.
quest.foundation.dia_eng.title: Diamond Engineering
quest.foundation.dia_eng.desc: Leveling up! After training your Mechanic (Level 4) and sacrificing the 16 Diamond Frames, dense material manipulation has been unlocked. Prepare for the Mid-Game with the &b&lElite Crafting Table&r&r.
quest.foundation.alch_peak.title: The Alchemical Apex
quest.foundation.alch_peak.desc: The final step before mastering matter. This is the most demanding research: it requires both your &a&lUniversity&r&r and the &d&lAlchemist&r&r to be at &c&lMax Level (5)&r&r, consuming the 8 Emerald Frames.
quest.foundation.eme_eng.title: Emerald Engineering
quest.foundation.eme_eng.desc: The peak of colonial knowledge. With the University and Alchemist at Level 5, plus the 8 Emerald Frames, you have reached maximum crafting capacity with the &2&lUltimate Crafting Table&r&r. The power of transmutation is near.
quest.foundation.final_eng.title: FINAL Engineering
quest.foundation.final_eng.desc: Complexity has escalated. If the Ultimate seemed like the limit, the &9&lEpic Crafting Table&r&r proves that infinity is a bit larger. This table is the final bottleneck between you and the Final Star.\n\n&7Note: Don't try to understand the geometry of this table, just automate the necessary resources.
chapter.arcane.title: Arcane Mastery Core
quest.arcane.start.title: Towards Arcane Mastery
quest.arcane.core.desc: The essence of &d&lMAGIC&r&r fused into a single core. This item is the fundamental component for Elite recipes and the next step in your journey towards total transmutation.
quest.arcane.core.catalyst_tip: &6&lTIP:&r&r After crafting the core, check the custom recipe for the &d&lInfinity Mana Catalyst&r&r to plan your next steps.
chapter.flux.title: Eternal Flux Core
quest.flux.start.title: Towards Eternal Flux Core
quest.flux.core.desc: The pinnacle of &b&lENGINEERING&r&r and energy stability. This core synchronizes the infinite flow of data and energy from your machines, serving as the mechanical foundation for Elite crafts and the primary engine of your industrial evolution.
chapter.calamity.title: Calamity Heart
quest.calamity.start.title: Towards Calamity Heart
quest.calamity.heart.desc: The ultimate proof of your &c&lSTRENGTH&r&r. Forged from the drops of the most dangerous beings in this world, this corrupted core is the final requirement to unlock final crafting and begin your divine journey.
quest.calamity.singularity.desc: &c&lDev Tip:&r&r If assembling the multiblock or configuring the disks feels like a "hell of a job", take a look at the mod's official tutorials by clicking the image below, or search for 'CrazyAE Research Station Guide' on YouTube.
chapter.stone.title: Philosopher's Stone
quest.stone.start.title: Equivalent Exchange
quest.stone.main.desc: You have achieved the impossible. By uniting supreme technology, ancient magic, and the remains of fallen deities, you have forged the ultimate artifact. The &6&lPhilosopher's Stone&r&r is not just a tool; it is your passport to absolute mastery over matter and energy. Welcome to the pinnacle of creation.
chapter.final.title: Final Star
quest.final.tomato.desc: &6&lGOLDEN TIP: &rThis tomato is fresh! For it to grow and drop fruits, you &nNEED&r to place a Stick above the plant. No support, no tomato!
quest.final.star.title: The Beginning of the End
quest.final.star.desc1: The &5&lFinal Star&r&r is not just a fuel; it is the key that unlocks the secrets of the universe. By forging it, you have transcended the need to learn.
quest.final.star.desc2: Hold the &a&o&lTome of Knowledge&r&r&r and feel every atom of creation being cataloged in your mind. From now on, if something has value, you know how to manifest it.
chapter.useful.title: Useful Items
quest.useful.intro.title: Welcome to Utilities
quest.useful.intro.desc: This section gathers items that will make your gameplay smoother and easier.
quest.useful.gadgets.title: Building Gadgets
quest.useful.gadgets.desc: Advanced tools for building and exchanging blocks in bulk. Essential for quickly raising your base or MineColonies structures.
quest.useful.wands.title: Construction Wands
quest.useful.wands.desc: Allows extending rows of blocks with a single click. Saves a huge amount of time on platforms and simple walls.
quest.useful.compass.title: Exploration Compasses
quest.useful.compass.desc: Magnetic locators. The first finds specific biomes, and the second locates structures (villages, dungeons, etc.) across the world.
quest.useful.mbtool.title: Multiblock Tool
quest.useful.mbtool.desc: Your best friend for visualizing and designing complex structures and multiblock machines in this pack.
quest.useful.routers.title: Modular Routers
quest.useful.routers.desc: The 'Swiss Army Knife' of automation. Can move items, fluids, and energy through blocks and distances without using cables.
quest.useful.entangled.title: Entangled Blocks
quest.useful.entangled.desc: Allows 'linking' two blocks. You can place a machine in one spot and interact with it from anywhere else on the map as if it were right in front of you.
quest.useful.flux.title: Flux Networks
quest.useful.flux.desc: Wireless energy system with no transfer limits. Essential for powering distant machines without the visual clutter of cables.
quest.useful.pipez.title: Pipez
quest.useful.pipez.desc: Low-cost, high-efficiency piping for items, fluids, gases, and energy. Can be improved with speed upgrades.
quest.useful.torcherino.title: Torcherino
quest.useful.torcherino.desc: Torches that speed up the 'tick' of nearby blocks. Ideal for accelerating crop growth or furnace speed.
quest.useful.megatorch.title: Mega Torch
quest.useful.megatorch.desc: Adds the 'Mega Torch', which prevents mob spawning in a huge radius, ensuring your colony stays safe without excessive lighting.
quest.useful.tiab.title: Time in a Bottle
quest.useful.tiab.desc: Accumulates time while in your inventory. Use it on machines to drastically speed up their work process for a few seconds.
quest.useful.magnets.title: Magnets
quest.useful.magnets.desc: Magnets that pull dropped items directly into your inventory. Essential for mining and combat.
quest.useful.backpacks.title: Modular Backpacks
quest.useful.backpacks.desc: Modular backpacks that can be upgraded with auto-feeding, filters, compression, and even furnace or crafting table upgrades.
quest.useful.trashcans.title: Trash Cans
quest.useful.trashcans.desc: Allows you to automatically delete useless items (like excess dirt or stone) so they don't clutter your chests.
quest.useful.enderstorage.title: Ender Storage
quest.useful.enderstorage.desc: Chests and tanks that share the same inventory through colors. Great for sending items from one point to another instantly.
quest.useful.crafter.title: RFTools Crafter
quest.useful.crafter.desc: Probably the fastest autocrafter in Minecraft. Tier 3 allows configuring up to 8 different recipes in the same block. It skips animations and processes crafts almost instantly.
quest.useful.merequester.title: ME Requester
quest.useful.merequester.desc: A vital utility for AE2. It keeps a specific quantity of items always crafted in your system.
quest.useful.elevator.title: Elevators
quest.useful.elevator.desc: Simple and effective. Elevator blocks that let you move between floors instantly just by jumping or crouching. Great for vertical bases.
quest.useful.booster.title: Infinite Booster
quest.useful.booster.desc: An upgrade for the Wireless Terminal that allows it to work at any distance and even across dimensions.
quest.useful.cardboard.title: Cardboard Boxes
quest.useful.cardboard.desc: The most powerful and cheapest logistics item you'll find. Allows 'packaging' and carrying almost any block in the game while keeping its NBT data.
quest.useful.packaged.title: PackagedAuto
quest.useful.packaged.desc: Essential for large-scale automation. They allow AE2 to handle complex recipes from Extended Crafting without locking up the system.
quest.useful.spawner.title: Custom Spawners
quest.useful.spawner.desc: Thanks to Apotheosis, you can collect any Spawner using Silk Touch and improve it with various items.
quest.useful.sink.desc: Provides an infinite source of water in a single block. You can use buckets on it or connect pipes to automate your systems.
quest.useful.transmutation.title: ME Transmutation Module
quest.useful.transmutation.desc: Allows AE2 to auto-craft items using EMC. &c&lImportant:&r&r Each craft consumes AE power (EMC/2000 AE per operation), which can drain your energy reserves quickly in late game.
quest.useful.energycell.title: Expanded Energy Cell
quest.useful.energycell.desc: An essential upgrade when using AppliedE. Since transmutation crafts consume EMC/2000 AE per operation, large crafts can stall your entire ME system. AE2 does not account for energy in its time estimate and will show infinite Time Remaining. Build this to avoid crafting bottlenecks.
chapter.welcome.title: Welcome!
quest.welcome.title: The Journey Begins
quest.welcome.desc1: Hello! Thank you so much for downloading and playing this modpack. It was built with care to provide a smooth and fun progression experience.
quest.welcome.desc2: If you find any bugs, have balancing suggestions, or just want to leave feedback, feel free to comment on the official &bCurseForge&r project page.
quest.welcome.desc3: The journey ahead is long, but the rewards are well worth the effort. Enjoy the game! &6- DFastix&r
